title: lithocarpus aspericupulus
intro: Lithocarpus aspericupulus, also known as the Chinese Bur oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. Lithocarpus aspericupulus has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, headache, and respiratory problems, and is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water to make a tea, which is often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
